name: codebase-rizz
description: codebase-rizz marketplace — single plugin that learns any codebase's lived wisdom and uses it to generate, review, and teach.

plugins.name: codebase-rizz
plugins.description: Learn any codebase's style, track who builds what, generate code in a specific engineer's voice, and get smarter every day from merged PRs. Includes bootstrap, review, learn crons, persona-based code generation, backfill for mature codebases, notifications via Gmail/Slack MCP, and opt-in auto-review with rollback.
